did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The study did not use AI to obtain its results. The diagnosis was performed by two independent human experts using a 'holistic approach' based on predefined morphological criteria derived from literature. While the paper mentions that LC-OCT devices often use machine learning for automatic segmentation (in the Introduction), the actual diagnostic classification in this specific study was manual and did not rely on AI algorithms for the results.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
